name: Amerigroup Corporation
description: Amerigroup Corporation was a managed healthcare company that focused on providing healthcare coordination services to individuals enrolled in publicly funded healthcare programs, including Medicaid, Medicare, and the Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP). Founded in 1994 and headquartered in Virginia Beach, Virginia, the company served millions of members across multiple states. In 2012, Amerigroup was acquired by WellPoint, Inc. (now Elevance Health, formerly Anthem, Inc.), which integrated its operations to expand its government business division.
